title: ecbolium boerhaviifolium
intro: Ecbolium boerhaviifolium, also known as the "Horned Poppy" or "Wild Poppy", is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ecbolium boerhaviifolium include relieving bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Ecbolium boerhaviifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
